lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day to you.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: And to you. Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: I am a supplier of leather armours and accessories. Ask and I will tell you what I know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about your armours.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: I have normal, studded and hard types.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about normal leather.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: Indeed, leather armour is excellent for archers. It's supple and not very heavy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's studded leather?

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: Ah, now that's leather covered with studs. It's more protective than ordinary leather.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's hard leather?

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: Hard leather is specially treated using oils and drying methods to create a hard-wearing armour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Enough about armour.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: As you wish, traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about your accessories.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: Ah yes we have a new range of accessories in stock. Essential items for an archer like you.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: We have vambraces, chaps, cowls and coifs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about vambraces.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: Ah yes, vambraces. These useful items are for your arms.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: A protective sheath that favours the bow and arrow. An essential purchase.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about chaps.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: Chaps have two functions: firstly to protect your legs, and secondly for ease of reloading arrows.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: I can highly recommend these to you for quick archery.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about cowls.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: The cowl is a soft leather hat, ideal for protection with maneuverability.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: These are highly favoured with our guards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about coifs.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: The coif is a specialized cowl, that has extra chain protection to keep your neck and shoulders safe.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: An excellent addition to our range, traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Enough about accessories.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've seen enough, thanks.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: Very good, adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to see what you sell.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: Indeed, cast your eyes on my wares, adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about your cape?

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: Certainly! Skillcapes are a symbol of achievement. Only people who have mastered a skill and reached level 99 can get their hands on them and gain the benefits they carry.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: The Cape of Ranging has been modified by Ava to function as one of her accumulator devices. Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've seen enough, thanks.

lines.speaker: Armour salesman
lines.text: Very good, adventurer.
